series_metadata.series_title: Hazardous Waste Program Authorization Applications and Rules
series_metadata.series_description: Includes all documents, worksheets and information used to draft applications for authorization to run the state hazardous waste program in lieu of the federal Resource Conservation and Recovery Act (RCRA) Subtitle C program, including authorization revision applications, etc. Includes all documents, worksheets and information used to draft rules, JCARR proceedings, transcripts of public hearings, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: authorization has been granted 1 year rule is adopted
